MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Arnold W. Evje appeared on behalf of Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. There being no appearance by Defendants, Oscar McKinney and Phillip Gibson, the request for jury trial is sticken and the trial date is confirmed.
